title: QA Engineer
responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams
requirements_text: We are looking for a junior specialist with hands-on experience in testing, jira, sql, postman, selenium. Strong communication and delivery ownership are expected.
benefits: Flexible schedule, paid vacation, learning budget, mentorship, and access to modern tooling.
summary: CloudForge is hiring a junior qa engineer to support validating product quality through manual and automated testing.
raw_text: Vacancy V040: QA Engineer at CloudForge. Location: Warsaw. Employment: full-time. Required experience: 0.5 years. Required skills: testing, jira, sql, postman, selenium, cypress. Optional skills: performance testing, mobile testing. Responsibilities: create and maintain test cases; automate regression and smoke checks; document defects and collaborate with engineering teams.
